docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ENDORSED COPIES OF SC-100 MAILED TO PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MINOR, DANTE AS TO DEFENDANT S.F.P.D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DANTE MINOR OR DEFENDANT S.F.P.D. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MINOR, DANTE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11/14/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
